Variable Full Name and Description: Birth Weight: Weight of the infant at birth
Birth Head Circumference: Size of the infant's head circumference at birth
Weeks Born Preterm: Number of weeks born before the due date
Birth Order: The order of this infant among all children in the family
Neonatal Health Index: Measure of health status at birth
Mother's Age: Mother's actual age in years at delivery
Sex: 1 for male, 0 for female
Twin Status: 1 indicates the infant is one of twins
Marital Status: 1 indicates mother was married at birth
Less than High School: 1 indicates mother's education is below high school
High School: 1 indicates mother's highest education is high school graduation
Some College: 1 indicates mother received some college education but did not obtain a degree
Cigarettes: 1 indicates mother smoked during pregnancy
First Born: 1 indicates this infant is the mother's first child
Alcohol: 1 indicates mother consumed alcohol during pregnancy
Drugs: 1 indicates mother used restricted drugs during pregnancy
Worked: 1 indicates mother had employment during pregnancy
Prenatal Care: 1 indicates mother received adequate care during pregnancy
Site-Arkansas: Little Rock Medical Center
Site-Einstein: Albert Einstein College of Medicine
Site-Harvard: Harvard University/Boston Medical Center
Site-Miami: University of Miami Medical Center
Site-Pennsylvania: University of Pennsylvania Medical Center
Site-Texas: University of Texas (Dallas) Medical Center
Site-Washington: University of Washington (Seattle) Medical Center
Receipt of specialist home visits and childcare
Cognitive Test Score (IQ) at age 3
